rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FIORANI LIVING TRUST DTD. 1/25/02 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Order Directing Trust Distribution For Reimbursement And The Payment Of Attorney'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 07, 2019 line 9. Motion For Entry Of Order Directing Trust Distribution For Reimbursement And The Payment Of Attorney'S Fees continued to March 27, 2019. All parties, receiver and their attorneys shall file their respective claims except for (Edith Mazzferi whose claim is already on file) no later than February 26, 2019. Notice of this order shall be provided to Lillian Ng by Lynn Searle no later than 2/8/2019 (proof of service to be filed no later than 2/11/2019.) Billing statements for all attorneys fees claimed to be provided for in camera review no later than March 29,2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JING ZHANG ET AL VS. TRINIDAD M. GWIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Continue Trial
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 07, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANTS TRINIDAD GWIN, FRANCES JOHNSTON'S Motion To Continue Trial Hearing Required to address: (1) why knowing about witness unavailability Defendant did not file Memo to Set seeking an earlier trial date (February 4, 2019) than the date proposed by Plaintiff in December 2018 e-mail exchange; did not inform Plaintiff of witness availability knowing what Plaintiff's suggested date for trial was ; or (2) why knowing about the trial date of February 11, 2018 at the latest on January 24, 2019 Defendant did not ask to advance the trial date to February 4, 2019 to accommodate their witnesses. Such advancement request would have been proper given the date of the filing of the Memo to Set, notwithstanding Plaintiff's request to set for February 11, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PRIYA SANGER ET AL VS. LEAH AHN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Leah Ahn'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defendant Leah Ahn'S Form Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer, Set One To Plaintiff Michel Sanger; And For An Award Of Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 07, 2019 line 8. DEFENDANT LEAH AHN'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defendant Leah Ahn'S Form Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer, Set One To Plaintiff Michel Sanger; And For An Award Of Sanctions GRANTED. Complete verified responses without objections (except, if attorney-client or work product privilege is asserted a privilege log shall be provided) shall be delivered to Defendant no later than 5:00 p.m. on February 19, 2019. Sanctions granted in the amount of $800 to be paid within 5 days of notice of entry of order.
